title: T-033 — Seed ship.* permissions onto roles (NNN-shipping-permission-seed.sql)
prompt:
# T-033 — Seed ship.* permissions onto roles (NNN-shipping-permission-seed.sql)

## Goal
Add an idempotent SQL seed migration that GRANTS the 14 `ship.*` permission strings (added by T-031) to the correct org roles, so the live click-through (DoD) does not 403. Closes cross-cutting audit finding X-1 (RBAC unseeded).

## Implementation contract
- New migration `NNN-11-shipping-permission-seed.sql` numbered contiguously ABOVE the current HEAD (runner regex `^(\d{3})-[a-z0-9-]+\.sql$`; next free number ≥ HEAD at run start so it is not silently skipped).
- Idempotent `INSERT INTO public.role_permissions (role_id, permission) ... ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING`, org-scoped, including the Apex bootstrap org.
- Resolve role_id by role key/name (no hardcoded UUIDs).
- Grant matrix from PRD `§3`: least-privilege per role; org-admin family receives the full `ship.*` set (mirror mig 149).
- Wire the shipping nav `permission_key` in `apps/web/lib/navigation/module-registry.ts` to the base read permission if null.

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
- AC1 — Each of the 14 ship.* permissions is granted to the PRD §3 roles; org-admin holds all 14.
- AC2 — A seeded least-privilege role is allowed on a granted action and 403 on an ungranted elevated action (integration test, real Postgres).
- AC3 — Migration re-run is a no-op (idempotent).
- AC4 — pnpm db:test green; RLS unaffected.

## Risk red lines
- Grants MUST be in a DB migration, not app-code only.
- Respect PRD §3 least-privilege; only org-admin gets the full set.
- Migration number ≥ HEAD contiguous (X-2).
- org_id Wave0 lock; app.current_org_id() scoping; no hardcoded role UUIDs.

pipeline_inputs.description: Seed role_permissions grants for the 14 `ship.*` strings (added by T-031) per PRD §3. Idempotent INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING, org-scoped (incl. Apex), role_id by key. org-admin full set (mirror mig 149). Migration ≥ HEAD contiguous (X-2). Closes X-1. Source: sidecar CONSOLIDATED-FINDINGS X-1.
pipeline_inputs.details: Seed grants for 14 ship.* strings per PRD §3 role matrix; pattern mirrors mig 146/148/149.
out_of_scope: Do not add/rename permission enum strings (that is the enum task T-031).
Do not grant write/elevated perms to viewer/read-only roles.

cross_module_dependencies.reason: Settings owns the permission enum + role_permissions schema (mig 080).
app.current_org_id()/withOrgContext for org-scoped grant resolution + the grant/deny integration test.

acceptance_criteria: Migration grants each of the 14 ship.* permissions to the PRD §3 roles; org-admin holds all 14.
A seeded least-privilege role is allowed on a granted action and 403 on an ungranted elevated action (integration test, real Postgres).
pnpm db:test green; RLS unaffected; nav permission_key wired if previously null.
test_strategy: RED: integration test asserting grant/deny both directions for a seeded role on real local Postgres before the migration.
GREEN: add the seed migration; re-run.
Re-run the migration to prove idempotency.
risk_red_lines: Grants must be in a DB migration, not app-code only.
Respect PRD least-privilege; only org-admin gets the full set.
org_id Wave0 lock; app.current_org_id() scoping; no hardcoded role UUIDs.
